# WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TLSConfiguration

**Structure**

Configuration for the TLS protocol.

## Declaration

```swift
struct TLSConfiguration
```

## Instance Properties

- **isCertificateRequired**: A Boolean value that indicates whether the configuration allows two-factor authentication for specific Transport Layer Security (TLS) configurations.
- **maximumTLSVersion**: The newest version of Transport Layer Security (TLS) that this configuration accepts to authenticate this network.
- **minimumTLSVersion**: The oldest version of Transport Layer Security (TLS) that this configuration accepts to authenticate this network.

## Enumerations

- **WINetworkSharingProvider.Network.Credentials.EAPCredentials.TLSConfiguration.TLSVersion**: Values that define the version of the Transport Layer Security (TLS) protocol to use with EAP authentication.

## Conforms To

- Decodable
- Encodable
- Equatable
- Hashable
- Sendable
- SendableMetatype
